title: anaphalis keriensis
intro: Anaphalis keriensis, also known as Tibetan alpine sea lavender, is a type of flowering plant native to the high-altitude regions of the Himalayas. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Anaphalis keriensis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
